root_cause: Invoke-EC2LaneStaticProof redirected native AWS stderr while ErrorActionPreference was Stop, allowing a NativeCommandError to terminate before LASTEXITCODE, start state, and AWS output were recorded.
remediation: Guard start-instances with a process-local ErrorActionPreference Continue/restore block matching the existing stop path.
Persist start_exit_code and start_output_tail in static-proof evidence.
Allow empty dry-run window IDs to produce structured blocked records instead of parameter-binding exceptions.
Align marker-plan and watchdog regression fixtures with the current runtime-window and least-privilege shutdown contracts.

worker_review.conclusion: missing native-command ErrorActionPreference guard on start path
worker_review.note: The worker diagnosis was technically useful but not accepted as a completed handoff because its confidence label included explanatory text.

boundaries: No generation occurred during the failed static-proof attempt.
The approved EC2 instance was stopped and the runtime marker archived.
This record proves the local remediation and regression coverage only; target-runtime OpenPose proof remains pending after PR merge.
No mask promotion, Wave70 hard gate, Wave71 activation, Jira mutation, or certification claim is made.
next_action: Checkpoint through PR, wait for Required preflight and package, merge, rebuild the exact-head OpenPose bundle, and rerun one guarded static proof.
